disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden fluctuating confusion and slurred, jumbled speech starting about an hour ago in a previously well adult
trigger_question_examples: What is different about how they are behaving or speaking?
Are they able to answer you and follow what you say?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: About an hour ago they suddenly started talking gibberish — slurred and jumbled — and they can't tell me their own name properly. It seems to come and go.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Widespread new non-fading dark purple spots and bruising with spontaneous gum bleeding, appearing over hours
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the spots on the skin — do they fade when you press them?
Is there any bleeding you can see?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Their skin is covered in dark purple spots and bruises that weren't there this morning, and they don't fade when I press them. Their gums are bleeding on their own.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High fever with rapid systemic deterioration in a previously well adult
trigger_question_examples: Do they feel hot — have you been able to take a temperature?
How unwell do they seem in themselves?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They're burning up — a home thermometer read 39.2. They've gone downhill so fast, they look really sick.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dark, almost black urine passed earlier today
trigger_question_examples: Have they passed urine — what colour was it?
Any change in the colour of their wee?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you ask — yes, they passed dark, almost black urine earlier today.

trigger_question_examples: Are they in any pain anywhere?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They keep gripping their whole tummy — they say it hurts badly all over.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Preceding day of profound fatigue and pallor before the acute deterioration
trigger_question_examples: When did the very first thing you noticed start?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yesterday they were completely wiped out and looked really pale, but nothing like this. It all exploded in the last few hours.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Previously fit and well, no regular medications, no recent travel or known infection
trigger_question_examples: Do they have any medical conditions or take any medicines?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They've always been healthy, don't take any medicines, and haven't travelled or been sick recently.
